"'''The Sith in the Shadow'''" is a comic that appeared in [[Star Wars Tales 13|''Star Wars Tales'' 13]] and was collected in ''[[Star Wars Tales Volume 4]]''.

==Plot summary==
[[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] and a [[Unidentified Human male Padawan (Mace Windu)|Padawan]] traveled to a planet where the natives worshiped the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]]. The Padawan was as fearful as the natives, and the two almost attacked one another, but Windu defused the situation. Soon after, Windu informed the Padawan that he was to find a nearby [[Sith temple/Legends|Sith Temple]]. Told that he must overcome an adversary within, the young Padawan ignited his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and headed inside. Inside, the apprentice found a cloaked figure and attacked it. The adversary was actually Windu, who blocked the student's attack and informed him that he had failed in his training. The reason for this failing is because the Padawan assumed that since the temple was a Sith Temple, everything inside must have been evil.
